title: Square 1.2ltr (155 x 155 x 87mm)
features: AIR AND WATERTIGHT - Four side locking system and hollow-centre silicone seal for superior airtight lockage - This airtight container can reopened and closed more than 3 million times
FREEZER AND MICROWAVE SAFE - Plan and freeze your meals or leftovers for later - Use this plastic container in the microwave to reheat your delicious lunch or dinner in a few minutes
DISHWASHER SAFE - For complete convenience, this batch cooking containers is completely dishwasher safe, meaning you will save time cleaning up every day
SPACE EFFICIENCY - This food containers with lids is designed to stack different sized containers on top of one another, allowing up to 40% more storage space in the fridge or cupboards
BPA FREE - Your safety is our priority - These meal prep containers with lids are BPA free and friendly to the body using superior durable and heat resistant raw materials
description: From the manufacturer LocknLock An ideal range of containers for lunches, salads, leftovers or any other items needing to be stored. The LocknLock silicone seal and locking mechanism means that your favourite foods can be created and stored hours before eating and yet still remain as delicious and fresh as the second they were made. Four sided lockable lid 100% airtight leak proof Easy to use and clean Microwave safe Freezer safe BPA free Multipurpose Containers Use our containers for food or any other purpose. All size and Shape Square, rectangle, round, our containers cover all you needs. LocknLock silicone locking system Ultra secure locking system to keep your food safe and fresh. LocknLock Discover our full range of LocknLock food containers. Round, rectangular, square or sets, we cover all your needs.
